description: Test vectors for keyed hash_32 using key b"LICHEN" (0x4c494348454e) as initializer. Matches Rust identity.rs, C lora_ping packet_hash and link_ctx tuple_crc, per spec 02a-coordinated-capacity.md and epic project-LICHEN-pgzj (v2 schema). Independent Python zlib.crc32 oracle only. All implementations must produce identical output.

vectors.name: iid_derivation_zero
vectors.description: Updated IID = hash_32(pubkey)[0:4] + hash_32(pubkey+0x01)[0:4] with U/L bit cleared
